name_en: National Museum of Machado de Castro
name_local: National Museum of Machado de Castro

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum bookstore is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a livraria do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah ah lee-vra-REE-ah doo moo-ZEH-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Vende livros sobre arte e história local.

likely_response.local: A livraria está perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH leev-ruh-REEUH ehs-TAH PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The bookstore is near the exit.

responses.english: The bookstore is near the exit.
responses.phonetic: AH leev-ruh-REEUH ehs-TAH PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.french: A livraria está perto da saída.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Claustro de D. Dinis, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KLOWSHT-roo DIH DEH. dee-NEESH, POOR fuh-VOHR?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Claustro de D. Dinis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo DIH DEH. dee-NEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Cloister of D. Dinis.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Cloister of D. Dinis.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo DIH DEH. dee-NEESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Claustro de D. Dinis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Numismatics Collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a coleção de numismática?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH noo-meezh-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums organize artifacts chronologically by floor. Staff expect direct, polite inquiries.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou a um monitor cultural.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR koow-too-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the front desk or a guide.

responses.english: Ask at the front desk or a guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR koow-too-RAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção ou a um monitor cultural.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum bookstore is
phrases.text_local: Onde se situa a livraria do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee see see-TOO-ah ah lee-vrah-REE-ah doo moo-SEH-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Museum bookshops sell academic guides and local crafts. Both cash and cards are widely accepted.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, perto da saída do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the museum exit.

responses.english: Good morning, near the museum exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: Bom dia, perto da saída do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Crypt is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a Cripta Romana?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH KREEP-tuh roo-MAHN-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Archaeological sites within museums require visitors to follow marked paths for preservation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, desça a escadaria monumental.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH moo-noo-mayng-TAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go down the monumental staircase.

responses.english: Good morning, go down the monumental staircase.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH moo-noo-mayng-TAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, desça a escadaria monumental.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Numismatics Collection is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar o caminho para a Numismática?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH noo-meezh-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Coin collections are housed in climate-controlled rooms. Staff provide concise directional guidance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Cripta Romana.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KREEP-tuh roo-MAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Crypt.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Crypt.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KREEP-tuh roo-MAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Cripta Romana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Numismatics Collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Coleção de Numismática?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH noo-meezh-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: As moedas e medalhas contam a história económica de Portugal.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou siga as placas para a Coleção de Numismática.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH noo-meezh-MAH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception or follow the signs to the Numismatics Collection.

responses.english: Ask at the reception or follow the signs to the Numismatics Collection.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH noo-meezh-MAH-tee-kuh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção ou siga as placas para a Coleção de Numismática.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to leave large bags
phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar as malas grandes?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee PO-soo dey-SHAR ahs MA-lahs GRAN-deesh
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags must be checked to protect exhibits. Tipping cloakroom staff is not customary.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à bilheteira principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à bilheteira principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Crypt is
phrases.cultural_note: Ruínas romanas do século I a.C. integradas no museu.

likely_response.local: Siga as indicações para a Cripta Romana.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AH KREEP-tuh roo-MAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Crypt.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Crypt.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AH KREEP-tuh roo-MAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as indicações para a Cripta Romana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the D. Dinis Cloister is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Claustro de D. Dinis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KLOWSHT-roo DIH DEH. dee-NEESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Cloisters are central to Portuguese monastic architecture. Quiet conduct is expected in these areas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cloister of D. Dinis is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova il Claustro de D. Dinis?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, DAW-vih SEE TRAW-vuh EEL KLOWSHT-roo DIH DEH. dee-NEESH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Cloister of D. Dinis is a key part of the museum's historical layout, often accessed via the Monumental Staircase.

likely_response.local: Attraverso la Sala de D. João V.
likely_response.pronunciation: uht-ruh-VEH-ruh-soo LUH SAH-luh DIH DEH. ZHOOOWN VEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Through the D. João V Hall.

responses.english: Through the D. João V Hall.
responses.phonetic: uht-ruh-VEH-ruh-soo LUH SAH-luh DIH DEH. ZHOOOWN VEH.
responses.french: Attraverso la Sala de D. João V.
